positive: A mystical, symmetrical forest scene rendered in clean, bold linework and stark contrast. The main subject is a large, stylized Stag with geometric antlers, standing in an ethereal clearing bathed in moonlight. Surroundings include abstract, minimalist woodland flora (ferns, moss, stylized roots) forming intricate negative space patterns. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry, woodcut engraving, and modern graphic design, featuring a limited, deep color palette of sapphire blue, forest green, and muted gold accents. Composition must be centered, with clear, identifiable silhouettes suitable for repeat pattern or single print placement. Dramatic, flat lighting; high detail in the linework, designed for screen printing on apparel. --ar 1:1 --style raw --s 750
